title: Trigger inserts duplicate value in UNIQUE column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_t0(c0 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c0;
CREATE TABLE fuzz_t0_temp(c0 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c0;
INSERT INTO fuzz_t0 SELECT DISTINCT c0 FROM fuzz_t0_temp;
key_bug_features: Trigger inserts duplicate value in UNIQUE column
